clues: A user reports that they cannot save files to their OneDrive folder on a company laptop.
The OneDrive icon in the system tray shows a red 'X' and says 'Sign in needed'.
Opening OneDrive prompts the user to re-enter their email address and password.
The user's Microsoft 365 account password was changed yesterday as part of a security policy.
The cached OneDrive credentials on the laptop have not been updated to reflect the new password.
